query: UPDATE leads SET corretorId = NULL WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); UPDATE leads SET corretorAnteriorId = NULL WHERE corretorAnteriorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute UPDATE leads SET corretorId = NULL WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); UPDATE leads SET corretorAnteriorId = NULL WHERE corretorAnteriorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
